_notes: Keyed by a route slug (your own convention — endpoint CRS codes joined, or a descriptive slug like CROSSCITY-BROMSGROVE-LICHFIELD when a route has more than two meaningful endpoints/branches). stopping_stations is an ordered array of CRS codes, each linkable to the corresponding stations-content.json entry. FIELD OWNERSHIP (see scripts/ for the population scripts): length_km/stopping_stations/type/operator are written by scripts/fetch-osm-facts.mjs (OpenStreetMap public_transport route relations, structured/physical — deterministic, no AI; if no clean relation exists this is flagged in _osm.notes rather than guessed). headline/opened_year/operating_since are written by scripts/fetch-wikipedia-facts.mjs (Wikipedia, narrative/historical — Claude extracts, never invents; headline is a punchy 8-12 word sentence, not a paragraph). schema_jsonld is written by scripts/build-schema-jsonld.mjs (template assembly from the fields above, no new facts, no API calls). name/wikipedia_title are manual/curated only. _osm/_wikipedia are provenance metadata written by their respective scripts.
